description: Artificial creatures animated by magic — golems, automatons, and enchanted objects.
creatures: Clay Golem
A lumbering clay giant that shrugs off spells and crushes walls with slow, deliberate blows.
Stone Golem
A statue ground to life, its stone fists cracking floors with every thundering step.
Iron Golem
A towering iron hulk that exhales clouds of poisonous gas and shrugs off sword blows like rain.
Flesh Golem
A stitched-together patchwork of corpses animated by lightning, prone to mindless berserk rage.
Wood Golem
A creaking wooden figure with splintering fists, slow to anger but quick to burn.
Glass Golem
A gleaming, transparent figure that reflects spells off its surface and shatters into razor-sharp shrapnel.
Animated Armor
Empty plate mail that clanks to life, swinging its weapon with the muscle memory of a dead knight.
Animated Weapon
A floating blade that parries and thrusts on its own, guided by an unseen will.
Shield Guardian
A hulking stone bodyguard that absorbs blows meant for its bonded master without flinching.
Scarecrow
A burlap-faced figure that stands motionless in fields until something draws too close.
Gargoyle
A stone grotesque perched on ledges, indistinguishable from architecture until it unfolds its wings and pounces.
Homunculus
A palm-sized creature molded from clay and blood, fiercely loyal to its alchemist creator.
Clockwork Soldier
A ticking, brass warrior that marches in lockstep and fights with mechanical precision.
Automaton
A whirring, gear-driven servant that follows its last command until it winds down or is destroyed.
